dataset_caveat: IMPORTANT: Literature AUROCs were derived from heterogeneous datasets that differ from the Kidney Cell Atlas (Mature_Full_v2.1) used in this study. Differences include: species (mouse vs. human), modality (bulk RNA-seq or clinical biomarker vs. snRNA-seq), injury model (IRI/cisplatin vs. steady-state atlas with maladaptive cell states), and cohort composition. Literature benchmarks serve as directional targets only.

recommendation: Benchmark source: background_literature_only. Atlas-using studies found (PMIDs: ['31604275']); using their AUROCs as direct comparators. Best benchmark AUROC=0.900. Target ≥0.910. Top methods: XGBoost. Suggest: ensemble approach combining RF + XGBoost with expanded feature set.
